title: India's robotics funding doubles in 2026 first-half, but scale seems far away

title: Google alerted users seconds before Venezuela's earthquake. Here's how Android phones detect tremors
summary: As two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela within minutes of each other, several Android users reported receiving Google earthquake alerts before the tremors reached them. The warnings were made possible by Google's Android Earthquake Alerts System.

title: Financial regulators scramble to counter AI rise with own tools
summary: Swiss financial regulator Marlene Amstad urges banks and watchdogs to rapidly adopt new technology to counter escalating cybersecurity threats amplified by AI. title: EU tech chief Virkkunen holds call with Apple CEO on Monday, Commission says
summary: The European Union's top tech official, Virkkunen, is scheduled for an urgent call with Apple's CEO on Monday. This high-level meeting, confirmed by the Commission, likely addresses ongoing digital regulations and tech policy discussions between the EU and the prominent technology giant.

title: Drone startup Elroy Air to list on Nasdaq via $1 billion SPAC deal
summary: Cargo drone startup Elroy Air is set to go public in the US through a $1 billion merger with blank-check firm Columbus Circle Capital Corp II. This strategic move, expected to yield at least $165 million, will fuel Elroy Air's development of autonomous heavy-cargo drones for defence and logistics.
